_comment: Continuum example. Copy these blocks into your Claude Code settings.json and replace ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO with the path to your clone. On Windows, use 'py' or the full python.exe path.
_wrap_note: OPTIONAL: already have your own status line? Keep it. Set CONTINUUM_WRAP below to your original status-line command, and Continuum's gauge appends to the END of your line instead of replacing it. Delete the env block if you do not need this.
